title: Product Catalogue with Upload & Rates Management

requirements.text: Create a backend data model and API for products, each with fields: id, name, category (e.g. Men's Wear, Women's Wear, Kids' Wear, Traditional/Ethnic Wear), price (Nat), imageUrl (Text), and description (Text). Implement CRUD operations: addProduct, getProducts, getProductById, updateProduct, deleteProduct.

quotes: create an app showing catelogue were i can also upload with rates

acceptanceCriteria: Products are stored persistently in stable memory on the canister.
addProduct accepts all required fields and returns the new product id.
updateProduct allows editing name, category, price, imageUrl, and description.
deleteProduct removes a product by id.

requirements.text: Build a Catalogue page displaying all products from the backend in a responsive grid. Each product card must show the product image, name, category badge, and price in Indian Rupees (₹). The page must include filter/sort controls by category. Style consistently with the existing warm saffron/gold and maroon theme.

quotes: create an app showing catelogue were i can also upload with rates

acceptanceCriteria: All products fetched from the backend are displayed in a card grid.
Each card shows product image, name, category, and price (₹).
Filtering by category (All, Men's Wear, Women's Wear, Kids' Wear, Traditional/Ethnic Wear) works correctly.
Layout is responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop.
Visual theme matches the existing saffron/gold and maroon palette.

requirements.text: Add an Admin Upload page (accessible via a link in the navigation bar) with a form to add a new product to the catalogue. The form must include fields for: Product Name, Category (dropdown), Price in ₹ (numeric input), Image URL, and Description. On submission, call the backend addProduct function and refresh the catalogue. Include basic client-side validation (all fields required, price must be a positive number).

quotes: i can also upload with rates

acceptanceCriteria: Upload form is accessible from the navigation bar (e.g., 'Add Product' link).
All required fields are present: Name, Category, Price, Image URL, Description.
Submitting a valid form calls the backend and adds the product.
The catalogue reflects the newly uploaded product without a full page reload.
Validation errors are shown inline if required fields are empty or price is invalid.
Success confirmation message is displayed after a successful upload.

requirements.text: Add a navigation link to the 'Catalogue' page in the existing responsive navigation bar, alongside the existing Home, Collections, About, and Contact links.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Catalogue' link appears in the navigation bar.
Clicking the link navigates to the Catalogue page.
The navigation bar remains responsive and correctly styled on all screen sizes.

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in a single actor in backend/main.mo.
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Visual theme must remain consistent with the existing saffron/gold and deep maroon palette established in prior features.
Prices must be displayed in Indian Rupees (₹).
nonGoals: User authentication or role-based access control for the admin upload page.
Real file/image upload (binary) — image URL input is sufficient.

required: Placeholder product image for Men's Wear clothing category card, warm saffron and maroon tones, fabric texture feel (mens-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
Placeholder product image for Women's Wear clothing category card, warm gold and maroon tones, elegant saree/ethnic fabric (womens-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
Placeholder product image for Kids' Wear clothing category card, bright warm tones, cheerful traditional fabric pattern (kids-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
Placeholder product image for Traditional/Ethnic Wear clothing category card, rich deep maroon and gold embroidery pattern (ethnic-wear-placeholder.dim_400x400.png)
